result:
All planning artifacts from this task are already authored and in place — the `out.json` shows a successful completion at `2026-06-17T23:45:19Z`. Here is the full accounting of what was produced and why.

---

## Project: `dogfood-codex-runtime` — Milestone Plan

**Three milestones, linear DAG.** The outcome requires exactly three human-reviewable gates that compose end-to-end:

```
milestone-01-codex-subagent        (root — no deps)
          │
          ▼
milestone-02-provider-dispatch
          │
          ▼
milestone-03-hetero-integration
```

---

### Milestone 01 — `milestone-01-codex-subagent`
**DependsOn:** _(none — root)_

The Codex subagent package in isolation — `internal/subagent/codex/` with `client.go`, `run.go`, `pricing.go`, `doc.go`, and `Dockerfile`. Fully behind `pkg/dispatch.Subagent`; `vendorSentinel = "openai"` compile-time guard; JSONL event-stream parsing; usage normalization (`prompt_tokens → InputTokens`, `completion_tokens → OutputTokens`, `prompt_tokens_details.cached_tokens → CacheReadTokens`, no `CacheCreationTokens` — OpenAI caching is automatic/marker-free); per-model pricing table for `EstimatedCostCents` + `CacheSavingsCents`. Offline-safe tests; live-API paths gated by `OPENAI_API_KEY` env.

**Gate:** package compiles, `make test` green, `make verify-*` passes (zero provider leakage), Dockerfile builds, pricing round-trips, sentinel test exercises the reject path.

---

### Milestone 02 — `milestone-02-provider-dispatch`
**DependsOn:** `milestone-01-codex-subagent`

Makes the controller provider-neutral. `ResolveProvider` in `dispatch_helpers.go` currently hardcodes `Vendor: "anthropic"` — this milestone rewrites it to walk the same precedence chain as `resolveImage` (per-level → project default → Helm default). Adds `SecretRefs.OpenAIAPIKey` so dispatch Jobs mount `OPENAI_API_KEY` from a declared K8s Secret. Helm chart gains `images.codexSubagent.*` and the new secret-ref operator knob.

**Gate:** `ResolveProvider` unit tests cover both `"anthropic"` and `"openai"` resolution paths + backward-compat regression; `make test` + `make verify-*` green; `helm lint` passes; `zz_generated.deepcopy.go` up-to-date.

---

### Milestone 03 — `milestone-03-hetero-integration`
**DependsOn:** `milestone-02-provider-dispatch`

End-to-end proof. A real `Project` CR routes planners (milestone/phase/plan levels) to Claude and executors (task level) to Codex across wave boundaries with correct failure semantics. Delivers `examples/projects/hetero-codex/project.yaml`, `docs/hetero-providers.md` (operator runbook), and an integration test or recorded trace proving: Claude pods receive `Vendor == "anthropic"` envelopes; Codex pods receive `Vendor == "openai"` envelopes; a Codex-wave task failure blocks only dependents (not independent later waves); `tide_cost_cents_total` emits non-zero for both vendor label values; dashboard cache-efficiency panel shows Codex cache-read savings.

**Gate:** example CR validates against live CRDs; integration test/trace documents all four observable properties; provider-firewall analyzer still clean.

---

### Machine contracts (already on disk)

| File | Kind | dependsOn |
|------|------|-----------|
| `children/milestone-01-codex-subagent.json` | Milestone | `[]` |
| `children/milestone-02-provider-dispatch.json` | Milestone | `["milestone-01-codex-subagent"]` |
| `children/milestone-03-hetero-integration.json` | Milestone | `["milestone-02-provider-dispatch"]` |

The orchestrator will fan out to a Milestone planner for each file in turn, respecting the `dependsOn` chain — M01 phases before M02 phases before M03 phases.
